Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A user's investment transaction for an asset.

date.description: ISO DateTime string of the transaction

valuePaid.description: Total value paid in fiat or base currency

quotation.description: Price per asset at the time of purchase

type.description: Type of operation: buy (compra) or sell (venda)

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Storage for user's individual cryptocurrency transactions.
